hero.title: Reports and traceability center
hero.description: Reach stock balance, serial traceability, packaging, shipment approvals, transfer chains, and support trace records from one place.

sections.operationalVisibilityDescription: Quick access to warehouse, packaging, quality, shipment, and support screens.
sections.workflowAuditDescription: Jump to list, status, and tracking screens for core operation modules.

stockBalance.title: Stock balance report
stockBalance.description: Review current operational balance by warehouse, stock, and variant.

serialBalance.title: Serial balance report
serialBalance.description: Track where serialized items are located and which stock context they belong to.

packageStation.title: Packing station
packageStation.description: Select packages, add items, close, print labels, and monitor packing operations.

packageSettings.title: Packaging setup
packageSettings.description: Manage carton/pallet materials, capacity limits, and packaging rules.

shipmentApproval.title: Shipment ERP approval queue
shipmentApproval.description: Manage completed shipments waiting for ERP dispatch document approval.

transferChains.title: Transfer chains
transferChains.description: Track ordered WT/PT/SH operations and blocked chain steps.

traceExplorer.title: Trace explorer
traceExplorer.description: Inspect audit, job, notification, and integration chains through one trace id.

qualityQueue.title: Quarantine queue
qualityQueue.description: Monitor records waiting for release, reject, and return after quality control.

shipmentLoading.title: Shipment loading operation
shipmentLoading.description: Track staging, vehicle loading, dock, and package statuses from one screen.

goodsReceipt.title: Goods receipt list
goodsReceipt.description: Goods receipt records for create/edit/delete/complete/ERP-send control.

transfer.title: Transfer order list
transfer.description: Track warehouse transfer orders and operational states.

shipment.title: Shipment order list
shipment.description: Monitor shipment orders, picking status, and ERP-send flow.

package.title: Package list
package.description: View package headers, cartons/pallets, lines, and label print states.

terminal.selectHint: Select a report module to open a terminal session.
